notes.dartdoc_approach_used: Approach 2 — dart doc HTML generation + index.json parsing. Approach 1 (--output-format json) does not exist in dartdoc 9.0.4. Run: cd <FlutterSDK> && dartdoc --output /tmp/flutter-dartdoc-out --no-include-source (~40s). Approach 3 not needed.

stats_delta.enum_values_note: dartdoc index.json does NOT index individual enum constants — known limitation

key_findings: dartdoc is strict superset of regex at type-name level: 0 regex false positives
+11 types missed by regex: sealed class variants (AmityUpload*), generic classes (LiveCollection with 24 members, PagingController with 19)
+65 extensions missed by regex: entire Amity<Enum>Extension convention invisible to brace-tracking (171 methods)
+474 non-enum-value members for shared types (AmityPost +22, AmityComment +21, AmityStory +26, etc.)
Enum values gap: 222 named constants in regex, 0 in dartdoc index.json — dartdoc only indexes .values synthetic property
No @internal annotations found in Flutter SDK (no package:meta dependency) — not a concern
notes.recommendation: Hybrid approach (mirrors TypeScript migration): Pass 1 = dartdoc index.json primary, Pass 2 = targeted enum-value regex. dartdoc wins for all class/extension members; enum constants filled from regex pass. Next task: implement hybrid + swap flutter.json.
